title: Systems by Economy
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FSDJump WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND SystemEconomy_Localised IS NOT NULL
detailQuery: SELECT SystemEconomy_Localised AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM FSDJump WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND SystemEconomy_Localised IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SystemEconomy_Localised ORDER BY value DESC
